---
title: "invert_affine"
generated: true
description: "Multiplicative inverse of an affine transform."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.affine`](../nitrix-geometry-affine.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:invert_affine -->
```python
invert_affine(mat: Float[Array, '... n np1']) -> Float[Array, '... n np1']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:invert_affine -->
Multiplicative inverse of an affine transform.

Promotes the affine to homogeneous square form via
[`make_square_affine`](../nitrix-geometry-affine/make_square_affine.qmd), inverts it, and drops the implied bottom row
back off.  The result maps coordinates in the opposite direction to
`mat`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:invert_affine -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mat` | `Float` | `...` × `n` × `np1` | — | Batched affine matrices in `(..., N, N+1)` form (or already square `(..., N+1, N+1)`). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `n` × `np1`. Batched inverse affines in `(..., N, N+1)` form.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:invert_affine -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `np1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
